product_card.layout: Vertical stack, image 1:1 aspect ratio with rounded corners, title 2 lines max.
product_card.price_display: Primary: NZD (Large, Bold, Black). Secondary: INR (Small, Gray, Strikethrough or alongside in brackets). Example: $45.00 NZD (₹2,250)

primary_button.styling: w-full bg-[#FF6200] text-white py-4 rounded-full font-bold text-lg

dual_currency_tag.styling: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md bg-gray-100 text-xs font-medium text-gray-800

motion_and_interactions.button_press: Scale down slightly (0.98) on press using standard React Native Pressable/TouchableOpacity
motion_and_interactions.image_load: Fade in transition or skeleton loader before image is ready

accessibility.contrast_ratio: Minimum 4.5:1 for standard text, verified against APCA standards
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44x44px for all interactive elements to ensure mobile accessibility
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactives must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid="add-to-cart-btn")

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI primarily for mobile screens using React Native (Expo) View, Text, ScrollView, FlatList, and SafeAreaView.
Implement bottom tab navigation consisting of: Home, Categories, Cart, Account.
Do NOT use HTML tags (div, span, p) since this is React Native.
For dual currency, display NZD as the main large price, and INR below it in smaller, gray text, eg: '$45.00 NZD (₹2,250)'.
All components must be .js files, NOT .tsx files as per user constraints.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs) for testing.
Use the provided media URLs for mocked product data.
Ensure touch targets for buttons are at least 44px high (h-11 or p-4).
